name: Freeport Militia
description: The military force that keeps order in the city of Freeport. Loyal to the Overlord.

name: Guards of Qeynos
description: The noble guard force protecting the city of Qeynos from evil.

name: Bloodsabers
description: A secretive cult of necromancers hiding beneath Qeynos, servants of Bertoxxulous.

name: Corrupt Qeynos Guards
description: Guards who have been bribed or corrupted by the Bloodsabers.

name: Crushbone Orcs
description: The aggressive orc clan based in Crushbone, led by Emperor Crushbone.

name: Runnyeye Goblins
description: The treacherous goblin tribe of Runnyeye, often allied with the Crushbone orcs.

name: Claws of Veeshan
description: The dragon faction of Veeshan's Peak, the most powerful dragons in Norrath.

name: Coldain
description: The dwarven people of the Wakening Land and Velious, fierce fighters against the giants.

name: Kromzek
description: The Storm Giants of Kael Drakkel, enemies of the Coldain and worshippers of Rallos Zek.

name: Kromrif
description: The Frost Giants allied with the Kromzek, found across the Velious frontier.

name: Priests of Life
description: The holy clerics and priests who serve the gods of good in Norrath.

name: Heretics
description: Followers of Innoruuk who have infiltrated the Plane of Hate. Enemies of all goodly factions.

name: Ring of Scale
description: The draconic faction of Kunark, led by ancient dragons who oppose the Claws of Veeshan.

name: Merchants of Qeynos
description: The trade guilds and merchant houses that control commerce in Qeynos.

name: Kithicor Dark Elves
description: Dark elves who haunt the haunted forest of Kithicor, servants of Innoruuk.
